topic_id.description: ROS global topic path to read from. Use `"--list"` to list the available ROS topics

return_type.description: The return type for the response, defaults to JSON

tensorfleet-project-path.description: Optional Tensorfleet project directory path for legacy .tensorfleet/.env fallback. Omit when using in-memory auth and config-store values.

regex_filter.description: Regex filter to apply to the query
